system.description: This useful item has two functions. Its primary use is to serve as a Corruption sponge for spellcasters: a Witch's Staff can absorb 1d3+1 points of Corruption resulting from Critical Successes or Channeling when spell casting. Once the Staff has reached its Corruption limit, it crumbles into ash. Its other function is to be a flying broom: the Witch's Staff can carry its owner, and one other passenger, at a rate of 20m/round per action. In a chase, it has Agility 0.
